summary: Completed comprehensive testing of OrthoConnect platform new features. All requested features are working correctly: WhatsApp button, Call Clinic button, Visit Website button on doctor profile, About page, Contact page, header navigation, surgeon registration portal, expanded subspecialties API, and Hindi search keywords.
passed_tests: API Health check - /api/ returns 'OrthoConnect API'
Subspecialties API - /api/meta/subspecialties returns expanded list (Spine, Sports Medicine, Trauma, Knee, Shoulder, etc.)
Doctor Profile by slug - /api/profiles/by-slug/dr-test-playwright-knee-mumbai-7ab3 returns full profile
Doctor Profile - website field present (https://www.drsample.com)
Doctor Profile - phone number present (+91 9876543210) for WhatsApp/Call buttons
Doctor Profile - locations array with facility details
Smart Search with Hindi - 'घुटने का दर्द near hyderabad' works correctly
Smart Search with English - 'knee specialist in 500096' works correctly
Search requires location - returns 400 when only subspecialty provided
OTP Request - MOCKED OTP returned in response
OTP Verify - Token returned on successful verification
Admin Login - Token returned with correct password
Admin List Surgeons - Returns list of surgeons
UI: Doctor Profile Page - WhatsApp button (green gradient) visible and functional
UI: Doctor Profile Page - Call Clinic button (teal gradient) visible and functional
UI: Doctor Profile Page - Visit Website button (outlined) visible and functional
UI: About Page - All sections present (Mission, Vision, AgileOrtho, Core Values, Leadership, Testimonials, CTA)
UI: Contact Page - Contact cards, form, Quick Links, Office Hours, Location all present
UI: Header Navigation - Patient Education, About, Contact links present
UI: Join Surgeon Page - Mobile input, OTP flow, MOCKED OTP display working
UI: Homepage - Search bar with Hindi tip, radius controls, popular searches
seed_data_creation: Test surgeon profile exists with slug: dr-test-playwright-knee-mumbai-7ab3

mocked_apis.OTP verification: MOCKED - OTP code is returned in /api/auth/otp/request response for testing

features_verified.whatsapp_button: ✅ Present on doctor profile when phone number exists - opens wa.me with pre-filled message
features_verified.call_clinic_button: ✅ Present on doctor profile - tel: link to clinic phone
features_verified.visit_website_button: ✅ Present on doctor profile when website is set - links to surgeon's website
features_verified.about_page: ✅ /about renders correctly with Mission, Vision, AgileOrtho, Core Values, Leadership, Testimonials
features_verified.contact_page: ✅ /contact renders correctly with contact cards, form, Quick Links, Office Hours, Location
features_verified.header_navigation: ✅ Contains Patient Education, About, Contact links
features_verified.surgeon_registration: ✅ /join loads correctly with mobile OTP flow and website field
features_verified.subspecialties_api: ✅ Returns expanded list including Spine, Sports Medicine, Trauma
features_verified.hindi_search: ✅ Search works with Hindi keywords like 'घुटने का दर्द'
features_verified.homepage: ✅ Loads with search bar, radius controls, popular searches, trust bar

context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified and working. Test surgeon profile at slug 'dr-test-playwright-knee-mumbai-7ab3' has phone (+91 9876543210) and website (https://www.drsample.com) for testing contact buttons. OTP system is MOCKED. Admin dashboard accessible with password 'admin'. Backend tests in /app/tests/test_orthoconnect_api.py cover all API endpoints.
